title: axi.query request

addr.description: Action-specific addr input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

address.description: Action-specific address input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

direction.description: Action-specific direction input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

id.description: Action-specific id input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

last.description: Action-specific last input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

name.description: Saved-object name in this action namespace; do not assume names are shared by cursors, lists, and protocol configs.

include_data.description: Action-specific include_data input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

output.description: Export destination and rendering controls. path, file_format, and verbose are supported only where this action declares them.

line_limit.description: Limits returned evidence rows only, not scanning, aggregation, or the verdict; read completeness fields as well.

index.description: One-based query, cursor, or list position; the action schema defines its exact reference set.

oneOf.description: Action-specific query selector. Do not copy index, channel, or filter forms from another action.

channel.description: Action-specific channel input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

handshake_time.description: Action-specific handshake_time input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

oneOf.description: Action-specific query selector. Do not copy index, channel, or filter forms from another action.

query.description: Action-specific query selector. Do not copy index, channel, or filter forms from another action.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

description: Query AXI channels and reconstructed transactions.
x-how_it_works: 第 N 个 transaction 用 1-based query.index，多条用 query.line_limit；已知锚点时用 query.channel（AW/W/B/AR/R）与精确 query.handshake_time 反查。逐 beat payload 仅由 output.include_data 展开。
x-when_to_use: 抽取 AXI beat/transaction 或从握手时间反查整笔事务。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: name; channel and handshake_time must appear together; do not mix handshake query with transaction selectors

do_not_use_when: 不要把本 action 用于 axi.analysis、axi.export 的业务目标；请改用列出的同域 action。
constraints: required: name; channel and handshake_time must appear together; do not mix handshake query with transaction selectors
